description: Style NoteThe adidas Neptune shoe has a simplistic, stylish design featuring the 3-stripes in a distinctive style to either side along with the Adidas logo on the heel and tongue. This running shoe with the air cushioned midsole is all you need to feel and perform like a champion. The contrast synthetic (Adidas trademark three stripes) adds a nice dimensionProduct DetailsSynthetic uppers with mesh inlays for professional use and durability with perforations around the toeFabric lining for comfort and central lace-up system for comfortable customised FitPadded tongue and collar for snug fit with Adidas branding on synthetic patch over heel cupFull length foam midsole for lightweight structureSoft, cushioned footbed for great comfort all dayNon marking rubber outsole with multi directional triangular lugs for maximum grip and tractionOutsole provides abrasion resistant support and protection for whole footBranding on the outsole and a deep groove at the heel for maximum mobilityMaterial and careSynthetic, meshWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
